creator: linpc@cs.nctu.edu.tw
text:
- Update to 1.7.4
- Depens on ports/175754: www/py27-djblets: update to 0.7.9
- Add option for subversion repository reviews
- Since devel/py-dateutil have updated to 2.1, and it supports only
  python-2.6+, so we set the USE_PYTHON variable to 2.6-2.7, and patch
  the Reviewboard source to remove dateutil==1.5 restriction
  (Thanks rm@ to help me solve this dependency problem)
- Use post-patch target to replace patch file

Removed file(s):
- files/patch-reviewboard-settings.py
